message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): probabilistic conflict model + AMS F2 sketch (bd-3iwr)

Implements §18.1-18.4: pairwise conflict probability, birthday paradox
N-writer formula, collision mass M2, effective collision pool P_eff, and
AMS second-moment sketch with BLAKE3-seeded SplitMix64 sign hashes.
12 tests covering all normative invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
